query: SELECT skill_id, name, learn_cost FROM game_unified_skill_catalog WHERE CAST(learn_cost AS CHAR) LIKE '%items%' AND CAST(learn_cost AS CHAR) NOT LIKE '%[]%' ORDER BY skill_id LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT skill_id, name, learn_cost FROM game_unified_skill_catalog WHERE CAST(learn_cost AS CHAR) LIKE '%items%' AND CAST(learn_cost AS CHAR) NOT LIKE '%[]%' ORDER BY skill_id LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
